€0Cost for concierges · always
For Concierges & GRMs · Always Free

Know where the money is.
Right now. Today.

Not to organise. Not to manage. To make more money — today, not eventually. Open ISLA the way a trader checks markets — to find the best opportunity available right now and act on it.

  • 1
    The fastest way to find the highest-paying booking
    Every venue's commission rate, live. When a guest asks where to go tonight, you know in seconds — not after three WhatsApps.
  • 2
    Your personal revenue dashboard
    Total owed, confirmed, overdue at a glance. Every outstanding payment visible. Chase overdue commissions in one tap.
  • 3
    Live opportunities — last-minute, high-spend
    Venues post elevated commissions and last-minute availability directly to ISLA. You hear about them first.
  • 4
    Your income is protected
    Every venue verified. Commission terms documented upfront. Payment reliability scores before you refer. No more surprises.
  • 5
    Your profile travels with you
    Ibiza today. Dubai, London, Mykonos tomorrow. One verified profile. Every market. Season to season.
S

The island's top earners.
Every week.

ISLA tracks performance anonymously across the concierge community. Venues can run private leaderboards within their team. Healthy competition. Real rewards.

Your position
Join to see where you rank

For venues — team competition

Create private leaderboards within your concierge team. Track who's sending the most business, reward top performers, and create healthy competition between your GRMs.

  • →Private team leaderboards
  • →Weekly and seasonal rankings
  • →Commission volume and conversion tracking
  • →Opt-in for concierges — private by default
  • →Available on Premium and Elite tiers
For Venues · From €500/yr

Stop losing your network
every October.

  • 1
    In front of the whole community — day one
    Your listing is visible to every verified concierge on the island immediately. No coffee meetings. No brown envelopes.
  • 2
    See who stopped referring
    Know exactly which concierges went quiet. The revenue you're losing is invisible without ISLA. With it, you see the change before thirty tables disappear.
  • 3
    One source of truth for all departments
    GRM, reservations, and finance all see the same thing. The communication breakdown that costs you commissions disappears.
  • 4
    Handover notes that survive October
    Store everything about each concierge. Your next GRM walks in on day one with the full picture — not a blank WhatsApp.
  • 5
    Pay reliably. Get recommended first.
    Your payment reliability score is visible to every concierge. It becomes your competitive advantage.

“The concierge doesn't cancel on you. They don't leave a bad review. They just quietly become someone else's best partner.”

ISLA · The Concierge Network · Ibiza 2026
Pricing

Simple. Transparent.

For Concierges€0Always free · no hidden costs
  • ✓Full venue directory access
  • ✓Commission rates and basis
  • ✓Referral logging and tracking
  • ✓Revenue dashboard
  • ✓Verified professional profile
  • ✓Leaderboard participation
Venue · Premium€1,200per year + 1.5% tracked commissions
  • ✓Verified venue listing
  • ✓Referral confirmation dashboard
  • ✓Full analytics and tracking
  • ✓Handover notes per concierge
  • ✓Payment reliability score
  • ✓Team leaderboard feature
  • ✓Priority placement
Start Premium →
Venue · Essential€500per year · no transaction fee
  • ✓Verified listing
  • ✓Commission info published
  • ✓Booking contact visible
  • ✓Seasonal hours and notes
  • ✓New opening announcement
  • —Referral tracking
  • —Leaderboard feature
Get Listed →

Payment always goes direct from venue to concierge. ISLA is the record layer — not a payment processor.

Questions & Answers

Everything you need
to know.

The season is
already here.

Every week you're not on ISLA is a week where opportunities are going to someone else. Join the island's private network.
